title: Gitleaks Cloud Output
description: Leaked API keys, wallet private keys, and secrets discovered across GitHub. Each finding is pushed as one dataset record. Records carry per-leak metadata (repo, file, line, permalink, commit, author) plus pairing info (id+secret in same file) and a `branch_ref` indicating whether the leak lives on a live branch, a PR ref, or a dangling commit.

findings.title: All Findings
findings.description: Default dataset. One record per leaked secret. Filter by `paired=yes` for directly-usable id+secret pairs, by `branch_ref` to focus on dangling commits or PR refs, or by `is_test_key=false` to drop public test keys.

log.title: Run Log
log.description: Full execution log with discovered repo list, per-repo scan timing, and any clone/scan errors.
